ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the clothing item belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the clothing item is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the clothing item is designed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing item is designed (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the measurement belongs to */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, width, circumference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the measurement (e.g., 18-24 months, 2-3 years) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the standard belongs to */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the standard belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the standard belongs to */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the sizing standard becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the sizing standard expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_standards_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_standards_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_standards_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production staff, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item sold */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the sale belongs to */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designer_clothing_items" (
  "designer_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer-clothing item pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the clothing item was assigned to the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designer_clothing_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designer_clothing_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_staff_clothing_items" (
  "staff_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production staff-clothing item pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production staff */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the clothing item was assigned to the production staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_staff_clothing_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_staff_clothing_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement updated */,
  "updated_value" REAL /* New value of the measurement */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was updated */,
  "reason_for_update" TEXT /* Reason for the update (e.g., change in design, change in measurement unit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_updates_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record where the change was made */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
